title: The Mouse Island Marathon
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo trains hard and wins a crazy 26.2-mile race after many wild adventures! 🏃

q.en: Who is Champ Strongpaws in the story?
q.zh: 故事里的尚普·斯特朗波是谁？

options.en: A wild cat that escaped from the museum
Geronimo's brother who owns a cheese shop
options.zh: 杰罗尼摩开奶酪店的哥哥

options.en: The editor in chief of The Rodent's Gazette according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 《啮齿动物公报》的主编（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Geronimo's friend and trainer who entered him in the marathon
options.zh: 杰罗尼摩的朋友兼教练，是他帮杰罗尼摩报名参赛的

explain.en: Champ Strongpaws is a star athlete and Geronimo's friend who signed him up for the Mouse Island Marathon and trained him.
explain.zh: 尚普·斯特朗波是一名运动明星，也是杰罗尼摩的朋友，是他帮杰罗尼摩报名参加老鼠岛马拉松并训练他的。

q.en: Where does the Mouse Island Marathon take place?
q.zh: 老鼠岛马拉松在哪里举行？

options.en: The Rattytrap Jungle according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 陷阱鼠丛林（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The city of Nibbles on Mouse Island
options.zh: 老鼠岛上的尼布尔斯市

explain.en: The race is held in the city of Nibbles, on the opposite side of Mouse Island, overlooking Stray Cat Harbor.
explain.zh: 比赛在尼布尔斯市举行，那里位于老鼠岛的另一侧，俯瞰着流浪猫港。

q.en: How long is the Mouse Island Marathon?

options.en: One hundred miles according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一百英里（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Champ tells Geronimo the marathon is 'just a mere twenty-six point two miles,' the standard marathon length.
explain.zh: 尚普告诉杰罗尼摩，马拉松“只有短短的二十六点二英里”，也就是标准的马拉松长度。

q.en: What did Geronimo eat on the plane to Nibbles?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩在飞往尼布尔斯的飞机上吃了什么？

options.en: Three lettuce leaves, two carrots, and a boiled turnip
options.zh: 三片生菜叶、两根胡萝卜和一个煮萝卜

options.en: A big slab of cheddar lasagna according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一大块切达干酪千层面（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The flight attendant served Geronimo three lettuce leaves, two raw carrots, and a boiled turnip because he was on a strict diet.
explain.zh: 空乘人员给杰罗尼摩端上了三片生菜叶、两根生胡萝卜和一个煮萝卜，因为他正在严格控制饮食。

q.en: What escaped animal chases Geronimo near the finish line?
q.zh: 终点线附近追着杰罗尼摩跑的逃跑动物是什么？

options.en: Fifi the cat, also called Felinius ferociousmus
options.zh: 名叫菲菲的猫，也叫凶猛猫

options.en: A friendly pet dog according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一只友好的宠物狗（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Fifi the cat (Felinius ferociousmus) had escaped from the Natural Science Mouseum of Nibbles and chased Geronimo, making him run faster.
explain.zh: 菲菲猫（凶猛猫）从尼布尔斯自然科学鼠物馆逃了出来，追着杰罗尼摩跑，反而让他跑得更快了。

q.en: Who is Gloomy Gus von Cacklefur?
q.zh: 忧郁的古斯·冯·卡克福尔是谁？

options.en: Geronimo's cousin according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 杰罗尼摩的表哥（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: The uncle of Geronimo's friend Creepella von Cacklefur
options.zh: 杰罗尼摩的朋友克里佩拉·冯·卡克福尔的叔叔

explain.en: Gloomy Gus von Cacklefur is the uncle of Creepella von Cacklefur and complains about the terrible weather in Nibbles.
explain.zh: 忧郁的古斯·冯·卡克福尔是克里佩拉·冯·卡克福尔的叔叔，他一直在抱怨尼布尔斯糟糕的天气。

q.en: At mile 13, who gave Geronimo a thick piece of cheddar?
q.zh: 在第13英里处，是谁给了杰罗尼摩一厚块切达干酪？

explain.en: At mile 13, Trap shoved a thick piece of cheddar into Geronimo's mouth to help him keep going.
explain.zh: 在第13英里处，特拉普把一厚块切达干酪塞进杰罗尼摩嘴里，帮他坚持下去。

q.en: What place did Geronimo finish in?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩最终获得了第几名？

explain.en: Chased by Fifi, Geronimo ran right through the tape and won first place in the Mouse Island Marathon.
explain.zh: 被菲菲追赶的杰罗尼摩冲过终点线，赢得了老鼠岛马拉松的第一名。

q.en: During the earthquake, how did Geronimo help a runner in danger?
q.zh: 地震发生时，杰罗尼摩是如何帮助遇险的赛跑者的？

options.en: He tied everyone's jackets together to make a rope
options.zh: 他把大家的夹克系在一起做成了一根绳子

options.en: He built a wooden bridge according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他搭了一座木桥（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: When a chasm opened, Geronimo gathered running jackets, tied them into a rope, and pulled the falling runner to safety.
explain.zh: 当路面裂开一道大缝时，杰罗尼摩收集大家的夹克，把它们系成绳子，把快要掉下去的赛跑者拉到安全的地方。

q.en: What marathon did Champ sign Geronimo up for next?
q.zh: 尚普又给杰罗尼摩报名了哪个马拉松？

options.en: The Rattytrap Jungle Marathon on the Rio Mosquito
options.zh: 蚊子河上的陷阱鼠丛林马拉松

options.en: The Nibbles Marathon again according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 再次参加尼布尔斯马拉松（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Right after the race, Champ tells Geronimo he signed him up for the Rattytrap Jungle Marathon on the Rio Mosquito.
explain.zh: 比赛刚结束，尚普就告诉杰罗尼摩，他已经帮他报名了蚊子河上的陷阱鼠丛林马拉松。
